data.title: Frequency Holdings Inc. (OTC: FRQN) simplifies disclosures by filing Form 15 to stop SEC periodic reports, choosing direct OTC reporting.
data.description: Frequency Holdings Inc. (OTC: FRQN) based in Chicago, Illinois, revealed on January 13, 2026, that it has submitted a Form 15 to the Securities and Exchange Commission. This move signifies the company's decision to no longer provide regular updates to the SEC, indicating a focused strategy towards direct-to-OTC reporting. This decision highlights the company’s streamlined approach for growth and future operations.

data.title: BTC reaches 2-month peak amid stable CPI; Shorts close positions, boosting rally fueled by earnings season optimism.
data.description: The surge in Bitcoin's value was driven by short positions being closed, as stable inflation figures and the commencement of earnings season bolstered trader confidence.

data.title: OneIM Acquisition Corp. prices $250M IPO with 25M units at $10 each, to be listed on Nasdaq.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, OneIM Acquisition Corp. revealed that they have effectively priced their initial public offering amounting to $250 million. The offering comprises 25,000,000 units valued at $10.00 per unit. These units are anticipated to be listed on The Nasdaq stock exchange.

data.title: LGBTQI+ leaders come together in LA to advocate for freedom and fairness for all Americans.
data.description: In Los Angeles, LGBTQI+ advocates recently convened to champion the rights of all Americans to live openly and equitably. The gathering brought together a significant number of leaders from the LGBTQI+ community and allies to address critical issues. Discussions focused on ensuring equal treatment and opportunities for individuals regardless of sexual orientation or gender identity. The event attracted participation from over 500 attendees, including prominent figures and activists. Overall, the assembly highlighted the importance of promoting inclusivity and diversity in society to create a more just and accepting environment for all.

data.title: Gilbane finishes renovation & expansion of Vacaville Cultural Center Library, a hub for Solano County residents.
data.description: In Vacaville, California, a newly transformed cultural center and library has been unveiled for Solano County residents. The project, a result of collaboration between Gilbane, a prominent global builder and developer, CannonDesign, and Solano County, was officially completed on January 13, 2026. This revitalized hub aims to offer enriching learning and cultural experiences to the local community. The Vacaville Cultural Center Library stands as a symbol of this partnership, ushering in a new era of education and engagement. Residents can now access a wealth of resources and services within this modern facility, marking a significant milestone for the region.

data.title: Pyrotecnico stages 600-drone halftime show for Steelers MNF playoff game celebrating 50 yrs of Terrible Towel.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, Pyrotecnico, a live events production company from New Castle with a 135-year history in fireworks, created a unique drone light display during halftime of the Pittsburgh Steelers' Monday Night Football playoff game.

data.title: ArrowMark Financial Corp (NASDAQ: BANX) plans rights offering for common shareholders to increase assets for future investments in financial institutions, offering opportunities for steady income.
data.description: The board of directors of ArrowMark Financial Corp has approved the issuance of transferable rights to the holders of the Fund’s shares of common stock, entitling them to subscribe for more shares. This decision was made to increase the assets available for investment. The offer aims to enable the Fund to take advantage of existing and future investment opportunities and provide current income and capital appreciation to shareholders. The proceeds of the offer will be primarily invested in regulatory capital relief securities, offering attractive income distributions. Existing shareholders have the opportunity to purchase common shares at a discount to market price.

data.title: Altus Group buys back 2,855,696 shares at C$57.00 each under substantial issuer bid for total of C$350 million.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Altus Group Limited disclosed that it has bought back and paid for 2,855,696 of its common shares at a rate of C$57.00 per share, under its significant issuer bid program, to repurchase and cancel its shares. The total amount spent on this buyback is not to surpass C$350 million. Altus Group, a prominent provider of commercial real estate intelligence, executed this move to enhance its market position.

data.title: SELCO Community Credit Union chooses eGain AI Knowledge Hub™ and AI Agent™ to modernize knowledge management.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on January 13, 2026, eGain Corporation (NASDAQ: EGAN) declared that SELCO Community Credit Union chose the eGain AI Knowledge Hub and AI Agent software to revamp its knowledge management system. This move aims to empower staff members throughout the organization.

data.title: MediDrive™ invests in SPRYT to advance AI-driven care access, transforming patient experience; Asa, SPRYT's AI, is award-winning.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, MediDrive, a prominent healthcare transport and logistics company in the US that focuses on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT), revealed a key investment in SPRYT, an Irish health-tech firm known for Asa, an acclaimed AI system. This move signifies a significant development in the healthcare industry, highlighting the growing collaboration between international companies. The partnership is anticipated to bring advanced technological solutions to improve the efficiency and quality of healthcare services.
